raw_response.message: Market closed - live chain fetch skipped in REAL_ONLY mode

reason: Market closed for the day (16:27+ IST). Live chain fetch correctly refuses to serve stale/fake data in REAL_ONLY mode. EOD/bhavcopy-based fallback data is not yet available because the bhavcopy_download scheduled job (18:30 IST) has not fired yet today.
required_fields_status: Not populated - no contract data available to extract exchange/underlying/segment/expiry/strike/CE_PE/trading_symbol/security_id/lot_size/tick_size/LTP/bid/ask/spread from.
equity_forecast_path_note: This blocker is specific to the OPTIONS trade path (valid option contract for options paper trading). It does not block the separate equity forecast/prediction path, which uses gain_rank data independently (see analyzer_signal_summary.json).
next_step: Re-check after 18:45 IST today (post signal_engine_bhavcopy job) for EOD-derived chain data, or during market hours tomorrow (2026-07-03) for live chain data.
